subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou Who hast faithfully fulfilled Thy Covenant, Thy Testament and Thy Promise, and hast manifested that which lay hidden in the treasury of Thy power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من وفیت بمیثاقک و عهدک و وعدک و اظهرت ما کان مکنونا فی خزینه قدرتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
